scripts.init: npm run update && AWS_PROFILE='martin' npx cdk bootstrap
scripts.build:api:pytest: PYTHONPATH=api poetry run pytest tests/ -v 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:api:coverage: PYTHONPATH=api poetry run pytest tests/ --cov=api --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:web:react: VITE_GOOGLE_TAG_ID=$(./spy.sh martin com.martincastroalvarez.secrets GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_ID) vite build
scripts.build:api: npm run build:api:black && npm run build:api:isort && npm run build:api:flake8 && npm run build:api:pytest && npm run build:api:coverage
scripts.build:web: npm run build:web:ts && npm run build:web:eslint && npm run build:web:prettier && npm run build:web:vitest && npm run build:web:react
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:cdk
scripts.deploy: npm run update && npm run build && AWS_PROFILE='martin' npx cdk deploy --require-approval never --all && npm run publish
scripts.publish: DISTRIBUTION_ID=$(cat ./outputs.json | jq -r '.GeometryStack.GeometryDistributionId') && AWS_PROFILE='martin' aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths "/*"
